mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, dept_code, dept_name, dept_type, leader_name, leader_phone, sort_no, status, remark, created_by, updated_by FROM sys_department WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, parent_id, dept_code, dept_name, dept_type, leader_name, leader_phone, sort_no, status, remark, created_by, updated_by FROM sys_department WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, parent_id, dept_code, dept_name, dept_type, leader_name, leader_phone, sort_no, status, remark, created_by, updated_by FROM sys_department WHERE dept_code = #{deptCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_department ( parent_id, dept_code, dept_name, dept_type, leader_name, leader_phone, sort_no, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{parentId}, #{deptCode}, #{deptName}, #{deptType}, #{leaderName}, #{leaderPhone}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_department SET parent_id = #{parentId}, dept_code = #{deptCode}, dept_name = #{deptName}, dept_type = #{deptType}, leader_name = #{leaderName}, leader_phone = #{leaderPhone}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_department SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_department WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0
